title: astragalus capito
intro: Astragalus capito, also known as the milkvetch or goat's thorn, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. It is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus capito include reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Astragalus capito can be prepared in various forms, such as dried roots, capsules, or teas, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
